---
id: update-automation
title: "编辑自动化"
description: "编辑自动化名称、启用状态、配置等。"
sidebar_label: "编辑自动化"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "patch api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"编辑自动化"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/automations/{automationId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



编辑自动化名称、启用状态、配置等。
:::tip
您可以编辑所有自动化的名称和启用状态，但是只能编辑 SCRIPT_JSON 自动化的配置。
:::


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"path","name":"automationId","description":"自动化 ID。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["updateMask"],"properties":{"name":{"type":"string","description":"新名称。","nullable":true},"enabled":{"type":"boolean","description":"新启用状态。true：启用；false：禁用。","nullable":true},"config":{"type":"object","description":"新配置。仅适用于 definitionType 为 SCRIPT_JSON 的自动化，其他类型自动化的配置不可编辑。","nullable":true,"additionalProperties":true},"updateMask":{"type":"array","description":"需更新的参数名称列表，仅支持 name、enabled、config。   \n**注意**：name 和 enabled 适用于所有自动化。config 只适用于 definitionType 为 SCRIPT_JSON 的自动化。 \n","items":{"type":"string","enum":["name","enabled","config"]}}},"title":"UpdateAutomationRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
